subject: A slender female-presenting figure with long white hair wearing a form-fitting red and white outfit, posed with arms slightly extended against a dramatic red and dark energy background.
suspected_ip: Towa — Dragon Ball Xenoverse / Dragon Ball Heroes
description: A tall, slender female-presenting figure stands in a composed, slightly spread-arm pose against a dramatically lit red and black energy background. The figure has long flowing white hair. She wears a form-fitting costume that is predominantly red with white accents — a sleek, villain-coded aesthetic. The background radiates red and dark energies with a chaotic quality. The overall composition is mid-shot with the figure centered. Her expression appears confident and composed, suggesting authority or menace rather than overt aggression.
foreground: Slender figure with long white hair in red and white form-fitting outfit, arms slightly extended
background: Red and black energy, chaotic swirling darkness
